extraction_candidates.name: HARNESS.md Methodology
extraction_candidates.description: 7-phase SOP for turning GUI applications into agent-native CLI interfaces. Covers codebase analysis, CLI design, implementation patterns, REPL integration, session management, and publishing.
extraction_candidates.notes: Methodology doc -- direct copy. Applicable to any project building agent-native tooling.

extraction_candidates.name: SKILL.md Format
extraction_candidates.description: Standardized AI-discoverable skill definition format. Tells agents what commands exist, what they do, and how to invoke them. Consistent across 28 harnesses.
extraction_candidates.notes: Format definition is portable. Could adopt for sonash-v0 skill files or any agent-facing tool.

extraction_candidates.name: ReplSkin Unified Terminal UI
extraction_candidates.description: Reusable REPL skin with prompt_toolkit integration, styled output (success/error/warning/info/table/progress), auto-detection of SKILL.md, command history.
extraction_candidates.notes: Python-specific. Would need adaptation for Node/TypeScript projects.

extraction_candidates.name: Registry + CLI-Hub Pattern
extraction_candidates.description: Single JSON registry file that powers a static discovery site. Each entry has name, version, category, install command, entry point. Hub auto-updates on merge.
extraction_candidates.notes: Pattern is highly portable. Good model for any tool ecosystem with a discovery hub.

extraction_candidates.name: Codec Allowlist Pattern
extraction_candidates.description: frozenset-based allowlist validation for subprocess arguments. Prevents injection by restricting values to known-safe set.
extraction_candidates.notes: Simple pattern but well-implemented. Applicable to any subprocess validation.

extraction_candidates.name: Skill Generator Scaffolding
extraction_candidates.description: Scaffolding tool that generates new harness boilerplate from templates. Reduces ramp-up time for contributors.
extraction_candidates.notes: Heavily tied to CLI-Anything structure. Pattern more portable than code.

extraction_candidates.name: Claude Plugin Marketplace Integration
extraction_candidates.description: Minimal config for Claude Code plugin discovery. Points to the cli-anything-plugin source directory.
extraction_candidates.notes: Novel -- one of the first Claude Code plugin marketplace entries. Format reference for building plugins.
